title: BillCalendar
description: Upcoming bills/recurring charges placed on a calendar, each annotated with its due date and a runway-derived predicted SAFE-TO-PAY date (FR-BILL-003). Provided by Module 4 to Pay, Cash Safety, Tasks, and Inbox. The safe-to-pay date is a MONEY-grounded annotation derived from CashFlowForecast (finos:spine/CashFlowForecast/1.0.0): when that primary money input is stale/missing the safe-to-pay date MUST be withheld (safe_to_pay_on null + safe_to_pay_status='withheld'), never guessed (Constitution VIII/VI). A safe-to-pay date after the due date marks an at-risk bill (Cash Safety precedence). Money is integer minor units (cents).

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial account picture; consumers MUST mark dependent views as Incomplete-data.

series_id.description: The RecurringSeries (SubscriptionInventory) this entry belongs to.

due_on.description: The bill's due date (UTC date; rendered to the user's locale at the edge).

due_on_is_estimated.description: true when the due date is estimated for an irregular-cadence series (cadence uncertain).

amount.description: Expected amount due, integer CAD cents (FX-converted upstream for foreign bills).

safe_to_pay_on.description: Predicted safe-to-pay date derived from CashFlowForecast. null when withheld (stale/missing runway) — consumers MUST NOT substitute the due date.

safe_to_pay_status.description: available = computed from a fresh forecast; withheld = runway stale/missing (money input withheld, Constitution VIII); at_risk = safe-to-pay would fall after due_on (shortfall, Cash Safety precedence).

safe_to_pay_source.description: cash_flow_forecast = derived from finos:spine/CashFlowForecast/1.0.0 (default, pre-Cash-Safety, spec C-1); safe_to_act_signal = overridden by Module 3's SafeToActSignal once it ships.

at_risk.description: true iff this bill cannot be safely covered before its due date (CashFlowForecast.shortfall_flag / safe_to_pay_on > due_on). Surfaces the Conflict Banner; safety takes precedence over pay-timing optimization.

freshness.description: Freshness of the runway/forecast input behind the safe-to-pay annotation. Stale runway ⇒ safe_to_pay_status='withheld'.
